title: Brazilian Banana French Toast
description: A sweet and indulgent breakfast dish inspired by Brazilian flavors, featuring crispy banana-stuffed French toast.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
2. Slice the sweet bread into 1-inch thick slices.
3. In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in the skillet or griddle.
5. Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
6. Place the egg-coated bread slices in the skillet or griddle.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes on the first side, or until golden brown.
8. Flip the bread slices and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, toast the sliced bananas in a separate skillet over low heat.
10. Assemble the French toast by placing a toasted banana slice on top of each bread slice.
11. Drizzle with honey, if desired, and serve immediately.
